## Summary

- What problem does this change address?
- Why is this change needed now?

## Changes

- List the concrete files or artifacts added, removed, or revised.
- Keep this section factual and implementation-specific.

## Why This Design

- Explain the reasoning behind the chosen approach.
- Note alternatives considered only if they matter to review.

## Validation

- List the exact checks run and their results.
- If a check was not run, say so explicitly.

## Risks and Follow-up

- Note residual risks, limitations, or deferred work.
- Call out any downstream docs or packaging updates still needed.
